case_title: SCHAPIRA, ARLENE SANCHEZ, PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE vs. GARRISON, JACQUELYN FRANKLIN et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SCHAPIRA, ARLENE SANCHEZ, PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF EDITH V. SANCHEZ, DECEASED

SANCHEZ, DECEASED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARRISON, JACQUELYN FRANKLIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 MERCEDES WAY, LEASE FORFEITED
